name: Stellar Lumens
description: The native cryptocurrency of the Stellar network. Stellar Lumens are used to facilitate transactions and maintain the network.

name: USD Coin
description: USDC is a fully collateralized US Dollar stablecoin. USDC is the bridge between dollars and crypto, making crypto more usable in everyday transactions.

name: Aquarius
description: AQUA is the governance and reward token for the Aquarius decentralized exchange protocol built on Stellar.
